commit.subject: LU-19539 osd-zfs: use osd_dmu_write() wrapper for xattrs
commit.message:
LU-19539 osd-zfs: use osd_dmu_write() wrapper for xattrs

When setting xattrs use the osd_dmu_write() wrapper which
internally calls the _by_dnode() version of dmu_write().  This
both avoids an extra lookup and hold on the dnode.  Furthermore,
it removes the osd-zfs dependency on the dmu_write() symbol
which will add an flags argument in OpenZFS 2.5.

Lustre-change: https://review.whamcloud.com/62101
Lustre-commit: 84f5994257b16910849f4ab3b27b3c49a45b1adc

Signed-off-by: Olaf Faaland <faaland1@llnl.gov>
Signed-off-by: Brian Behlendorf <behlendorf1@llnl.gov>
Change-Id: I30ba7abbcf0eefb3dee01b4061baaace2d971842
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Tony Hutter <hutter2@llnl.gov>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
